advancedBuffs.0: Charm Emperor Mushroom & Charm Queen Mushroom: Summon Interval → 10s | Charm Queen Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.1: Charm Emperor Mushroom & Charm Queen Mushroom: Can now summon Odyssey Rigid Corpses
advancedBuffs.2: Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter: No more rest after firing an Ultimate Doom Shell | Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to Epic variants
advancedBuffs.3: Destroy Eradicate Mushroom Machine Gun Shooter: Now fires a Ultimate Doom Shell every round instead of every 4th round | Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom: Now fires an Ultimate Doom Shell every 4 attacks | Effects also apply to Epic variants
advancedBuffs.4: Sun Light Emperor Fruit: Click Cost 500 → 200 Sun | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit: Healing amount ×2 | Effects also apply to Epic variants
advancedBuffs.5: Sun Light Emperor Fruit: Toughness reduces by 10 for each hit instead of 50 | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit: Click cost 500 → 200 HP | Fire Flame Emperor Fruit Subspecies Unlocked | Effects also apply to Epic variants
advancedBuffs.6: Black Steel Ground Spike King & Ground Spike Tough Fruit: Damage multiplied by 5 | Black Steel Ground Spike Tough Fruit Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.7: Black Steel Ground Spike King & Ground Spike Tough Fruit: Gains 95% DMG Reduction
advancedBuffs.8: Bath Fire 3 Line Shooter: Shots can now pierce infinitely and cause Enflamed explosions upon impact | Fly Fire 3 Line Shooter Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.9: Bath Fire 3 Line Shooter: Enflamed damage bonus 50% → 150%, and regular ignited projectiles can now inflict the debuff
advancedBuffs.10: Cold Ice Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom & Sunburst-shroom: Icicles now pierce infinitely and split into two diagonal icicles upon impact the first five times
advancedBuffs.11: Cold Ice Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom: Damage to Frozen/Chill-immune zombies 4× → 12× | Sun Light Machine Gun Little Spray Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.12: Sun Energy Flower Pot: Upgrade costs from Silver Flower Pots to Gold Flower Pots will not exceed 8k
advancedBuffs.13: Sun Energy Flower Pot: Coins exceeding the maximum amount will be converted into Sun at a rate of 2:1
advancedBuffs.14: Green Treasure Rock Umbrella: Activates Ultimate automatically if zombies are near | Red Treasure Rock Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.15: Green Treasure Rock Umbrella: Damage Boost 100% → 300%
advancedBuffs.16: Magic Way Cat Tail Grass: Drone Attack Damage ×3 | Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek: Summoned Drone is no longer nerfed and fires 60 shots normally
advancedBuffs.17: Magic Way Cat Tail Grass: Regular Attack Damage ×5 | Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek: Attack Damage ×3 | Magic Way Rabbit Ear Leek Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.18: Illusion Eradicate Mushroom: All Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosions are now craterless | Greed Desire Mushroom Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.19: Illusion Eradicate Mushroom: Now spawns 3 extra Hypnotized Gargantuars and Snow Sled Vehicle Rigid Corpses when it explodes
advancedBuffs.20: Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch & Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower: 1% Damage increase to Coin projectiles/lasers for every 1000 Coins you have
advancedBuffs.21: Shake Money 3 Line Fire Torch: Coin projectiles now deal splash damage | Shake Money 3 Line Road Lantern Flower Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.22: Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrella: Energy Limit ×10, Recovery Speed ×20, Healing Speed ×2 | Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella: Damage in Scatter Mode increases linearly up to ×4, Damage in Focus Mode ×4 | Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.23: Flow Light Sage Glow Umbrella: Normal Attack Damage ×3, Explosion Damage ×10, Attack Interval → 2s | Cold Crystal Sage Glow Umbrella: Cryo-beam in Focus Mode now applies Freeze for 1s
advancedBuffs.24: Iron Bean Little Team: Sniper always headshots with a 1/3 chance to trigger rapid-fire, but attack CD increased to 7.5s | Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team: Attack damage ×3
advancedBuffs.25: Iron Bean Little Team: Flak cannon knockback ×2, splash damage ×3 | Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team: Attack damage ×3 | Iron Bean Sudden Strike Team Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.26: Magnet Force Mushroom King: Attack Range ×2 | Magnet Force Mushroom Queen: Metal Production CD halved | Magnet Force Mushroom Queen Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.27: Magnet Force Mushroom King: Absorbs 3 Metal Objects at once, damage to Super Tier 3 Fork Halberd Rigid Corpses or Black Olive Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpses ×3 | Magnet Force Mushroom Queen: Heal amount ×3, extra Metal Object production limit (3 + n/3) → (5 + n/2)
advancedBuffs.28: Death God Big Mouth Flower & Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunder: Seed packet drop is now guaranteed
advancedBuffs.29: Death God Big Mouth Flower & Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunder: Rigid Corpse Soul damage transfer ×2 | Death God Earth Bean Ground Thunder Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.30: Core Burst Cherry Peach & Core Burst Squash Melon: Radiation Zone initial duration increased from 7s to 10s
advancedBuffs.31: Core Burst Cherry Peach & Core Burst Squash Melon: Explosive cherries and Ultimate Doom Shells have a 1% chance of transforming into Nuclear Debris when they hit zombies | Core Burst Squash Melon Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.32: Squash Oil Emperor Spike & Squash Oil Emperor Pot: Cornveyor and Cornposter's Butter stun duration ×3 | Squash Oil Emperor Pot Subspecies Unlocked
advancedBuffs.33: Squash Oil Emperor Spike: Now makes zombies on it to continuously slide to the right | Squash Oil Emperor Pot: Butter Chance for the plant above 50% → 100%
advancedBuffs.34: Multi Skill Energy South Melon: On entry, grants all connected Magnetic Plants a Shield equal to 30 × number of Magnetic Plants | Multi Skill Energy Foreign Peach: On entry, resets and grants them an Attack buff of 0.5% × number of Magnetic Plants instead
advancedBuffs.35: Multi Skill Energy South Melon & Multi Skill Energy Foreign Peach: Now counts twice towards the number of Magnetic Plants
advancedBuffs.36: Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon: Explosion Frequency x2
advancedBuffs.37: Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon: Each zombie hit by Fierce Flame Bamboo Dragon's fire breath increases the damage of the next hit of that same attack by 1%, stacking up to 400%
advancedBuffs.1000: Gloves' cooldown is reduced by 10s (No CD for the plant Glove), and can now move Mini-bosses
advancedBuffs.1002: Each Sun now gives more value | 5 → 15 → 25 → 50 → 75
advancedBuffs.1003: Gloves' cooldown is halved, and can now move Mini-bosses
advancedBuffs.1006: You now have the option to re-pick your Plant Loadout during the game
advancedBuffs.1007: Rigid Corpses take an additional 1800 damage when they take more than 1800 damage (after damage reduction)
advancedBuffs.1011: The freeze time of all zombies is increased by 25%, and the slow rate from chill is increased by 10%
advancedBuffs.1012: Gain 3000 Sun, then double your total amount of Sun after | Sun Cap 50k → 100k
advancedBuffs.1013: True Cherry Peach Explode Bullet: Explosive cherries will now deal at least 1800 damage and cause Cremator damage
advancedBuffs.1014: Clicking on the same plant when you have it on your Glove will disassemble it | 20 seconds cooldown
advancedBuffs.1015: When two identical plants are placed one above the other (adjacent in the same column), they gain a 50% damage bonus and a 50% damage reduction
advancedBuffs.1016: Hypnotized zombies gain a 500% damage buff and 80% damage reduction (WARNING: Also causes Cherry Read Newspaper Rigid Corpses from Empress/Charm Queen Mushroom to not lose their newspaper on summon!!)
advancedBuffs.1017: All Meteors' attack cooldowns are halved | Base Meteor DMG increased by 300 for every Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor in the field
advancedBuffs.1018: Adds 4 Lumos Levels for the entire field
advancedBuffs.2000: True Destroy Eradicate Mushroom: Destroy Eradicate Mushroom rounds will now release a craterless Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion upon impact
advancedBuffs.2002: You can upgrade 1 upgradable Epic Modifier
advancedBuffs.2003: If a Plant Type has dealt the highest total damage on the field, its attacks deal an extra 30% of original damage as true damage
advancedBuffs.2004: After firing 50 times (25 for catapults), plants gain an unlimited attack speed for 1s
advancedBuffs.2005: Plants gain 1% life steal, applied to the plant with the lowest HP percentage on the field
advancedBuffs.2006: If a zombie goes undamaged for a set amount of time, the next hit it takes will deal greatly increased damage
advancedBuffs.2007: Gains the Corrupt Sac. Corruption effect: each time a Rigid Corpse is damaged, the next instance of damage to it is increased by 5% (stackable)
advancedBuffs.2008: You can remove 1 Rigid Corpse Modifier from the View Modifier menu
advancedBuffs.3000: When Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit (or their subspecies) are both present, Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God/Ultra Extreme Poison Garlic Battle God no longer has a maximum Toughness cap, and Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit/Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit gains a 90% damage reduction
advancedBuffs.3001: If there are at least 10 Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors and 10 Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetables on the field, the Mini Sun summoned by the Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable will never disappear and deal 5× damage, and will keep summoning Helios Meteors
advancedBuffs.3002: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter now spreads its shots evenly across three lanes with sine and cosine trajectories, and Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch and its subspecies triggers a full-field Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect if it can't plant a Spicy plant
advancedBuffs.3003: When there are at least 10 Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperors and 10 Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetables on the field, Selene's summoned Mini Moon will not disappear, while each Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor and Selene will charge a beam into the Mini Moon, which redirects it to target the zombie with the most amount of HP
advancedBuffs.3004: Hail melons from Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon's Nebula Rifts now deal 6× damage and create Singularities, and Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice always lob Ultimate Black Holes. When an Ultimate Black Hole collapses, it also detonates all Singularities to further increase its own damage
advancedBuffs.3005: Click on a reloaded Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery while holding an Epic Fire Flame Emperor Fruit with the Glove to make all reloaded Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery on the field perform a synergized attack towards the sky. Every 8th Inferno Shell shot calls down an Inferno Meteor dealing 80× damage, decimating all zombies on the screen
advancedBuffs.3006: When Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter is placed above Epic Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Little Courage Mushroom, the more they attack, the more bullets they fire in the next volley. This bonus decays after they stop attacking. (WARNING: Will lead to cancerous amounts of projectiles!!)
advancedBuffs.3007: Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter can lock onto any Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower ahead (click to select) to charge it. When energy exceeds 10k, its brightness increases, dealing heavy damage and slowing zombies in its radius. At 100k, collapses into a black hole and explodes, devastating all zombies on screen. (WARNING: Contains flashing lights)
advancedBuffs.4000: Summons an Abyssal Chibi to fight for you (replaces current Pet). His hammer smash damages both nearby plants and zombies, grants damage reduction to affected plants, and deals increased damage to zombies based on nearby plants' HP. Hammer effects scale with xp level
advancedBuffs.4001: Summons a Mini Striker to fight for you (replaces current Pet). Every 3s, he moves to the plant with the lowest HP percentage and rallies the area, healing nearby plants and increasing damage taken by zombies. Rally effects scale with xp level
advancedBuffs.4002: Summons a Prototype Iceborg to fight for you (replaces current Pet). She targets the highest-HP lane and fires ice projectiles. Damage increases based on the number of chilled/frozen zombies, and gains infinite pierce & bonus xp if the Iceborg Executrix is on the field. Projectile damage scale with xp level
advancedBuffs.4003: Summons a Baby Jill to fight for you (replaces current Pet). Every 15s, she performs a random attack: summons high-tier hypnotized Clown-in-the-Box zombies per lane or throws out explosives (lane-wide or global). Explosion damage scales with xp level
advancedBuffs.5000: Plants deal +100% to Mini-bosses and Bosses
advancedBuffs.5001: Plants gain a 5% damage bonus for every Rigid Corpse Modifier you have
advancedBuffs.5002: Unlock Ultra Extreme Sword Sage Foreign Peach
advancedBuffs.5003: Plants deal ×2 damage but receive ×4 damage
advancedBuffs.5004: Seed packets no longer need recharge but each use costs 15× their base Sun + 50% of the player's current Sun
advancedBuffs.6001: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God Mastery I: Healing Power +100%
advancedBuffs.6002: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God Mastery II: Attack Damage +50%
advancedBuffs.6003: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter Mastery I: Cherry and other variants of projectiles' explosion radius +50% and damage +100%
advancedBuffs.6004: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter Mastery II: Cherry and other variants of projectiles' explosion radius -50%  but damage +300%
advancedBuffs.6005: Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom Mastery I: Frozen zombies take +50% more damage
advancedBuffs.6006: Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom Mastery II: Hypnotized zombies deal 3× damage
advancedBuffs.6007: Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch Mastery I: Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effect changes from instant to DoT, dealing 1/3 the original damage 10 times within 1s
advancedBuffs.6008: Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch Mastery II: Grants projectiles +50% damage before igniting them
advancedBuffs.6009: Plants in the fifth column get 50% increased maximum Toughness and 50% damage reduction. Each column to the left reduces damage cap by 10% and increases damage reduction by 10%
advancedBuffs.10001: Immediately gain 2 Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit seed packets which start with 1M HP
advancedBuffs.10002: Upgrade (1+n) random plants to Tier 1, where n is the number of Plant modifiers you currently have
advancedBuffs.10003: Increase the speed of (1+n) random plants, where n is the number of Plant modifiers you currently have
advancedBuffs.10004: Gain an Undying Totem. The next time zombies reach the house, it is ignored for 3s and knock all zombies back to the start
advancedBuffs.10005: Gain the seed packet of all Epic Odyssey Fusions (no Subspecies)
advancedBuffs.10006: Knock all zombies back to the start, then instantly defeat all zombies
advancedBuffs.10007: Gain a Super Cold Ice Super Tier Machine Gun Shooter with +1500% damage and HP, +1000% speed, and gain an extra Extreme Cold Ice Bean
advancedBuffs.10008: Gain a random Odyssey plant. Each new zombie wave, it gains +25% damage, +25% HP, and +10% speed
advancedBuffs.10009:
Gain a Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom seed packet. Planting it ACCEPTS the challenge:
Summon 3-6 random Odyssey zombies in each lane (yeah, ALL possible ones)
Defeat them all to unlock the Modifier "Corrupt Sac"
advancedBuffs.10011: All plants gain 50 + (2% max HP) shield per second
advancedBuffs.10012: Gain the Saurian Medallion. When you have 20 or more plants on the field, zombies reaching the house no longer results in game over, but causes all plants to have 1/3 chance to die instead
advancedBuffs.10013:
Gain an Multi Skill Energy South Melon seed packet. Planting it ACCEPTS the challenge:
The number of zombies in the next 20 waves are doubled
Get through and all plants on the Multi Skill Energy South Melon's tile will be promoted to Tier 3
advancedBuffs.10014: Unleash all current lawnmowers and restore one full column of them
advancedBuffs.10015: You will not game over if you manage to kill the zombie reaching your house within 1.5s
advancedBuffs.10016: Immediately gain 5 Model Imitater seed packets
advancedBuffs.10017: Upon gaining a second copy of any plant for the first time, you receive an additional seed packet of that plant
advancedBuffs.10018: Using the glove to move a plant onto another plant of the same type and tier upgrades it by 1 tier
advancedBuffs.10019: Immediately gain 10 Surprise Happy Yellow Gold Vases. Additionally, receive 1 per wave and 5 per flag (huge wave)

ultimateBuffs.0: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God & Ultra Extreme Poison Garlic Battle God: HP Recovery ×3
ultimateBuffs.1: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Battle God & Ultra Extreme Poison Garlic Battle God: Devour CD reduced to 15s
ultimateBuffs.2: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter: Explosive cherries from plants ×3 damage
ultimateBuffs.3: Ultra Extreme Cherry Peach Shooter & Ultra Extreme Float Sky Cherry Peach Shooter: Attack Speed +100%
ultimateBuffs.4: Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom: Attack speed ×3; Ultra Extreme Sage Person Palm attack damage ×3; Iceclaw Rigid Corpse attack damage ×3
ultimateBuffs.5: Ultra Extreme Big Spray Mushroom: Rigid Corpses will take 30% of their current health as damage when unfrozen
ultimateBuffs.6: Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch & Foreign Peach Tree Stump: Projectiles required to spawn a Spicy plant are halved
ultimateBuffs.7: Ultra Extreme Fire Burst Squash Torch & Foreign Peach Tree Stump: Ignites the lane immediately when spawning a Spicy plant is not possible
ultimateBuffs.8: Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor: Attack Interval 1.5s → 0.5s
ultimateBuffs.9: Ultra Extreme Foreign Peach Big Emperor: Lv1: Base damage ×2 and damage cap (300) increased to 3000; Lv2: Base damage ×3, damage cap removed
ultimateBuffs.10: Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom: Explosion damage on death → 1M | Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower: Lumos boost on death ×3
ultimateBuffs.11: Ultra Extreme Worry Gloom Mushroom & Ultra Extreme Road Lantern Flower: Now immune to Cherry and Jack-in-the-Box explosions. After resisting 10k points of explosive damage, triggers a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosion
ultimateBuffs.12: Ultra Extreme Thrower & Rot-pult: Spread-fire is now guaranteed
ultimateBuffs.13: Ultra Extreme Thrower & Rot-pult: Lv1: Stacking Poison points will immediately poison the zombie and Poison Value Cap → 120; Lv2: Poison Value Cap removed
ultimateBuffs.14: Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery: Main Blast damage ×4 | Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Grenade Bullet Artillery: Damage ×4
ultimateBuffs.15: Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Cannon Artillery & Ultra Extreme Cold Quiet Grenade Bullet Artillery: Reload Time 36s → 12s
ultimateBuffs.16: Obsidian Tall-Nut & Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit: Max HP Cap ×3
ultimateBuffs.17: Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit & Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Earth Bean Tough Fruit: Can now absorb the damage directed to the two plants on its left and right
ultimateBuffs.18: Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom: Hypnotization HP threshold increased from 60% to 100% | Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse South Melon: Damage to captured hypnotized Rigid Corpses halved
ultimateBuffs.19: Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom: Attack Interval → 1s, Charge Level will not drop below 2 and can be fed metal to reach Charge Level 3 for 5 mins | Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse South Melon: Charge Level 3 unlocked
ultimateBuffs.20: Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk & Railgun: Attack Power ×3 and Knockback Strength ×3
ultimateBuffs.21: Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk & Railgun: Lv1: Defense increases as Toughness decreases. Below 500 HP, becomes immune to damage under 1k; Lv2: Below 500 HP, base damage ×2
ultimateBuffs.22: Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable: When Sun exceeds 15k, each of Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable's attacks consumes 0.5% of the excess to boost projectile damage by 20 per 1 Sun spent | Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable: Damage increased by 3× per Lumos Level
ultimateBuffs.23: Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable: Mini Sun deals 3× damage | Ultra Extreme Moon Bright God Roll Heart Vegetable: Mini Moon heals 3×
ultimateBuffs.24: Laser & Ultra Extreme Magnet Burst South Melon: Wingmen Amount 1 → 3
ultimateBuffs.25: Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon: Wingmen and Drone DMG ×3
ultimateBuffs.26: Ultra Extreme Fire God Bounce Bounce Mushroom: Charging speed and max charging duration ×3
ultimateBuffs.27: Ultra Extreme Fire God Bounce Bounce Mushroom: Inferno lasts twice as long
ultimateBuffs.28: Ultra Extreme Greed Desire Water Grass: Plants deal 5% more attack damage for every 1000 points owned (up to +300%)
ultimateBuffs.29: Ultra Extreme Greed Desire Water Grass: The Odyssey shop now has a 30% discount on Modifiers
ultimateBuffs.30: Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice: Ultimate Black Hole can absorb all projectiles
ultimateBuffs.31: Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice: Ultimate Black Hole's absorption radius ×2
ultimateBuffs.32: Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce: Boreal reaper saws now last for 15s | Ultra Extreme Winter Bamboo Road Block: Now receives only 1/3 incoming damage
ultimateBuffs.33: Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce: Healing is no longer split among plants | Ultra Extreme Winter Bamboo Road Block: HP and Shield recovery ×2
ultimateBuffs.34: Ultra Extreme Lantern Cage Giant Mouth Flower: Attack Range ×2
ultimateBuffs.35: Ultra Extreme Lantern Cage Giant Mouth Flower: Provides 2 Lumos Level to a 5×5 area during digestion
ultimateBuffs.36: Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery: Volcanic Bombs Damage ×3 | Ultra Extreme Burst Break Mortar Strike Artillery: Pyro Cabbages Damage ×3
ultimateBuffs.37: Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery: Now triggers Thermonuclear Detonations when main blasts strike Cherry Peach Explode Bullets or Fire Burst Spicy Peppers | Ultra Extreme Burst Break Mortar Strike Artillery: 10% chance to trigger Cherry Peach Explode Bullet and Fire Burst Spicy Pepper effects at the barrel position and ignore the target limit of 10
ultimateBuffs.38: Ultra Extreme Towards Sun Flower: When a solar shot hits a zombie, it cause nearby projectiles to explode as well
ultimateBuffs.39: Ultra Extreme Towards Sun Flower: Energy cap ×3, Sun production amount after storage overflow ×3
ultimateBuffs.40: Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon: Nebula Rift now focuses on the zombie with the least HP for the first half of the barrage | Ultra Extreme Ice God Destroy Eradicate Mushroom: Now only creates one set of portals, but they spawn ×10 ice particle streams
ultimateBuffs.41: Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon: Cryo-melon damage ×6, but with decreased splash radius | Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon & Ultra Extreme Ice God Destroy Eradicate Mushroom: Rigid Corpses immune to Chronoshift will still take damage equal to (Elapse Time)% of their HP
ultimateBuffs.42: Ultra Extreme Burst Flame Cat Tail Grass: Heatbeam damage frequency ×2
ultimateBuffs.43: Ultra Extreme Burst Flame Cat Tail Grass: Regular shots' damage ×3
ultimateBuffs.44: Ultra Extreme Sea Demon Mushroom: Tangler minions can drown up to 3 zombies (or deal ×3 damage), and each zombie drowned rewards 10 energy stacks
ultimateBuffs.45: Ultra Extreme Sea Demon Mushroom: Fires 3 base attack projectiles at once
ultimateBuffs.46: Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom: Soul charge cap increased to 10, now gains 1 soul charge whenever a Mini-boss dies
ultimateBuffs.47: Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom: When using a soul charge, also grants 1s of invincibility to all plants
ultimateBuffs.48: Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter: Lv1: Lumos energy cap increase from 1000 to 2000; Lv2: Lumos energy cap further increased to 10k
ultimateBuffs.49: Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter: Boosts Transfer efficiency by 50%, and by 250% if target's energy < 1000

unlocks.8: Unlock Ultra Extreme Black Shiny Rock Tall Tough Fruit: Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruit + Fire Flame Tall Tough Fruit
unlocks.9: Unlock Ultra Extreme Charm Confuse Mushroom: Super Tier Charm Confuse Mushroom + Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom
unlocks.10: Unlock Ultra Extreme Machine Gun Artillery Desk: Machine Gun Pea Artillery Desk + Black Shiny Rock Spicy Pepper Mushroom
unlocks.11: Unlock Ultra Extreme Sun God Roll Heart Vegetable: Sun Light Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower + Gold Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower
unlocks.12: Unlock Ultra Extreme Laser South Melon: Super Tier South Melon + Magnet Force 3 Leaf Grass
unlocks.13: Unlock Ultra Extreme Fire God Bounce Bounce Mushroom: Fire Melon + Olive Big Spray Mushroom
unlocks.14: Unlock Ultra Extreme Greed Desire Water Grass: Twin Gold Goblet Flower > Super Tier Water Grass
unlocks.15: Unlock Ultra Extreme Super Time Space Jade Rice: Jade Rice Little Thrower ×3 + Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower
unlocks.16: Unlock Ultra Extreme Cloud Spruce: Super Tier Cloud Spruce + Lily Flower Cloud Spruce
unlocks.17: Unlock Ultra Extreme Lantern Cage Giant Mouth Flower: Lantern Cage Big Mouth Flower > Giant Size Big Mouth Flower
unlocks.18: Unlock Ultra Extreme Burst Break Cannon Artillery: Fire Flame Cannon Artillery + Cherry Peach Spicy Pepper
unlocks.19: Unlock Ultra Extreme Towards Sun Flower: Fire Torch Towards Sun Flower + Gold Towards Sun Flower
unlocks.20: Unlock Ultra Extreme Ice God West Melon: Ice Melon + Super Time Space West Melon Thrower

unlocks.22: Unlock Ultra Extreme Sea Demon Mushroom: Sea Mushroom Group + Sea Demon Mushroom

unlocks.24: Unlock Ultra Extreme Flow Light Shooter: Flow Light Middle Continue Shooter + Super Time Space Pea Shooter

debuffs.0: Cherry Peach Machine Gun Shooter Read Newspaper Rigid Corpse: Ability to walk through plants when its newspaper's broken
debuffs.1: Cherry Peach Machine Gun Shooter Read Newspaper Rigid Corpses will be immune to all status effects
debuffs.2: Black Olive Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpse: Bites now disable plant healing for 1s
debuffs.3: Black Olive Tall Tough Fruit Rigid Corpse: Bites weaken plants, making them receive 3× damage for 1s
debuffs.4: Super Tier Machine Instrument Sea Pig Rigid Corpse: Movement speed is now doubled
debuffs.5: Super Tier Machine Instrument Sea Pig Rigid Corpse: Gains 50% Damage Reduction
debuffs.6: Kirov Fly Ship Rigid Corpse: Immunity to 3 Leaf Grasss | Increased Movement Speed
debuffs.7: Kirov Fly Ship Rigid Corpse: Drones' HP Increased by 50 times
debuffs.8: Little Ugly Jump Jump King: Will always explode regardless of its state, and its charging time is reduced by 90%
debuffs.9: Little Ugly Jump Jump King: Jack-in-the-Box-type Rigid Corpses affected by the explosion will turn into Little Ugly Jump Jump Kings
debuffs.10: Super Tier 3 Fork Halberd Rigid Corpse: Tridents deal 5× damage
debuffs.11: Super Tier 3 Fork Halberd Rigid Corpse: Now ignores Umbrella-type plants and targets random plants to attack
debuffs.12: Dance King Point Command Official: Can now summon White Color Hold Pole Dance Kings
debuffs.13: Dance King Point Command Official: Will now phase through plants when sliding in
debuffs.14: Thousand Year Corpse King: Explosion damage will now ignore immunities by Play Doll South Melons and other relevant plants
debuffs.15: Thousand Year Corpse King: Dash CD reduced | Attack Power Greatly Increased
debuffs.16: 3 Fork Halberd Charge Vehicle: Now immune to most status effects and throws 5× as many tridents
debuffs.17: All your existing plants have a 1/3 chance to perish (applied once)
debuffs.18: Your Sun will be reset to 0
debuffs.19: Double the health of all zombies
debuffs.20: Increase the maximum limit of zombies per wave to 100
debuffs.21: Dance King Ice Vehicle Rigid Corpse: Spawns Every Round | Spawns Dance King Point Command Officials when it dies
debuffs.22: Dance King Ice Vehicle Rigid Corpse: Increased Movement Speed
debuffs.23: Abyssal Gargantuar: Spawns Dr. Zomboss when it dies
debuffs.24: Pozeidon will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.25: Ultra Machine Instrument Tough Fruit will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.26: Giga Football Striker will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.27: Skystrider Mecha will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.28: Jackson Worldwide will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.29: Professor Cherryz will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.30: Hop Extreme Rigid Corpses have a chance to drop an Odyssey Rigid Corpse in the 4th column or further to the right and will gain 90% DMG Reduction
debuffs.31: Queen Jill-in-the-Box will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.32: Rigid Corpses have a chance to revive to full HP on death
debuffs.33: You can have no more than 120 plants on the field
debuffs.34: See Practice Alpha Little Team will also appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.35: See Practice Alpha Little Team can now recover from being incapacitated infinitely
debuffs.36: 3 Fork Halberd Charge Vehicle will attack in advance
debuffs.37: Giga Football Archduke will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.38: Laser Shoot Secluded Float Rigid Corpse: Dissolver Beams now target the farthest plant within range
debuffs.39: Laser Shoot Secluded Float Rigid Corpse: Siphon Drainer's range: 1 Tile → 3×3 Area
debuffs.40: Special Type Armed Equipped Giant Person: Appearance no longer matters, has the extra abilities of all four affinities at once
debuffs.41: Special Type Armed Equipped Giant Person: Appearance no longer matters, has the debuff immunities of all four affinities at once
debuffs.42: Castle Rampart 3 Fork Halberd Giant Person: Trident Reload Speed ×3
debuffs.43: Special Type Yellow Gold Giant Person will appear
debuffs.44: Destroy Eradicate Machine Gun Read Newspaper Rigid Corpse will appear
debuffs.45: Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit: For the first 50 hits, all zombies take only 1 damage
debuffs.46: Super Tier Machine Instrument Tough Fruit: For the first 100 hits, zombies gain 0.1s of damage immunity after each hit
debuffs.47: All healing and shields on Plants are reduced by 50%
debuffs.48: Plants lose max HP equal to 10% of the damage received (capped at 40% and resets between rounds) when taking damage
debuffs.49: Your Points will be reset to 0
debuffs.50: Millennium Dragon & Warden will appear as a Mini-boss
debuffs.51: The maximum number of zombies each wave is halved, but all zombies have ×2 HP and Attack
debuffs.52: Special Type Machine Instrument Fly Disc will appear

investmentBuffs.0: Plants do 40% more damage in the first 50% of the round
investmentBuffs.1: At the end of each round, gain 300 points for every type of plant that dealt 0 damage this round (up to 10 plant types)
investmentBuffs.2: At the end of each round, gain 1.5k points and 5% more max HP for all your plants if none of your plants reached 0 HP in this round
investmentBuffs.3: Turn all plants on the lawn into random plants, gain 1000 points immediately and the Glove will have no CD in this round
investmentBuffs.4: Immediately gain 10 random Odyssey plants as seed packets
investmentBuffs.5: Every time a Mini-boss is defeated, all plants heal for 10% of their max HP
investmentBuffs.6: All non-mini-boss Rigid Corpses have 10% less HP
investmentBuffs.8: Every wave, 1500% base damage is dealt to the zombie with the most HP
investmentBuffs.9: The plant type that deals the most damage deals an additional 25% damage
investmentBuffs.10: At the start of every round, your plants gain 3% damage reduction for every type of non-Odyssey plant on the lawn, up to 30%
investmentBuffs.11: At the start of every round, the 6 plants with the most damage gain a 20% damage boost
investmentBuffs.12: You gain 6 extra rerolls in the Shop if you didn't buy anything from the last visit
investmentBuffs.1000: <color=#AF4900>Shovel all of your plants, but your Sun is doubled, and at the start of every round all plants gain Shield equal to the total amount of Sun cost of the plants shoveled
investmentBuffs.1001: <color=#AF4900>Shovel all of your plants, but your Sun is doubled, and Seed packets have no CD in this round
investmentBuffs.1002: <color=#AF4900>Your teams gain an 18% chance to crit
investmentBuffs.1003: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, your plants gain 3% more HP and 6% more attack damage for every type of plant on the lawn
investmentBuffs.1004: <color=#AF4900>The plant type that deals the most damage deals an additional 40% damage and your teams also do 10% more damage
investmentBuffs.1005: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, the leftmost regular plant in every lane gains a 150% attack speed boost, but at the start of every wave, they receive damage equal to 1000% of their max HP
investmentBuffs.1006: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, the leftmost regular plant on every lane gains a damage boost equal to 0.1% of the rightmost regular plant's max HP, and the rightmost regular plant gains max HP equal to 1000% of the leftmost regular plant's damage
investmentBuffs.1007: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, your teams gain a 25% chance to crit, and 30% reduced max HP
investmentBuffs.1008: <color=#AF4900>Your teams gain a 10% chance to crit. At the start of every round, that chance is increased by 1%
investmentBuffs.1009: <color=#AF4900>Your teams gain a 10% attack damage boost. At the start of every round, if there are 200 or more plants in your teams, all plants gain an additional 50% attack damage boost
investmentBuffs.1010: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round and now, gain 1.5k points and an extra reroll
investmentBuffs.1011: <color=#AF4900>At the start of every round, promote a random non-Odyssey plant to Tier 2
investmentBuffs.1012: <color=#AF4900>You gain a Surprise Happy Gift Box every time you perform a fusion
investmentBuffs.1013: <color=#AF4900>Your plants do 40% more damage in the last 50% of the round
investmentBuffs.2000: <color=#007FFF>Your teams gain a 25% chance to crit. They also gain a chance equal to 30% of their crit chance to reduce any incoming damage to 1
investmentBuffs.2001: <color=#007FFF>Your teams gain 25% damage reduction, and crit chance equal to their damage reduction rate
investmentBuffs.2002: <color=#007FFF>At the start of every round, every plant has a 50% chance to gain a 100% attack damage boost
investmentBuffs.2003: <color=#007FFF>Your teams gain a permanent 8% attack damage boost every time a Mini-boss is defeated
investmentBuffs.2004: <color=#007FFF>At the start of every round, promote a random non-Odyssey plant to Tier 3
investmentBuffs.2005: <color=#007FFF>Increase your teams' crit chance by 30%. If the crit chance is above 100%, crit damage is increased by 40%
investmentBuffs.2006: <color=#007FFF>A super rare Fire Red Lily that holds a ton of Points appears (you gain 20k Points)
investmentBuffs.2007: <color=#007FFF>Immediately gain 5k points. From now on, you gain 3k points if you enter into the next round without buying anything from the Shop
investmentBuffs.2008: <color=#007FFF>You have a 45% chance to gain an extra reroll when you reroll
investmentBuffs.2009: <color=#007FFF>At the start of every round, gain 2k points
investmentBuffs.2010: <color=#007FFF>At the start of each round, gain a Stellar Model Imitater. If used on a plant with a Stellar form, it becomes that plant's Stellar variant
investmentBuffs.2011: <color=#007FFF>Gain 500 points every time you reroll in the Shop or when selecting Rigid Corpse Modifiers
investmentBuffs.2012: <color=#007FFF>Deplete all of your current points. For every 1k points depleted, your plants gain a 1% chance to crit
investmentBuffs.2013: <color=#007FFF>For this round only, you gain 10k points and win the round if a zombie enters your house
